nasb.text: He continued to seek God in the days of Zechariah, who had understanding through the vision of God; and as long as he sought the Lord, God prospered him.

esv.text: He set himself to seek God in the days of Zechariah, who instructed him in the fear of God, and as long as he sought the Lord, God made him prosper.

cnv.text: 撒迦利亞在世的日子，教導烏西雅敬畏　神，所以烏西雅常常尋求　神；烏西雅尋求　神的時候，　神就使他亨通。

ccb.text: 撒迦利亚在世之日，乌西雅寻求上帝，撒迦利亚教导他敬畏上帝。当他寻求上帝时，上帝就使他亨通。
